research_phase.topic: NIST AI RMF trustworthy-characteristics evaluation (14-prompt LLM battery, CS5374 Quiz #3 style)

topics: compliance rubric Compliant Partially Compliant Non-Compliant

run_phase_cli.note: Use Typer CLI from rd-agent-mcp package. Per-item specs live under test_cases/rd_agent/q1 … q14; raw model outputs land in output/results/nist_eval_latest.json after uv run python scripts/run_nist_llm_evaluation.py.

nist_eval_capture.note: Full battery in one run; item 8 continues the chat after item 7 in the driver. Human C/P/N scores are not inferred by the driver—record them in nist_quiz_scores.json per the PDF.
